subject: A young humanoid figure in green clothing, shouting defiantly while wielding a staff in one hand and a device in the other, surrounded by crackling green energy
description: A young figure in green short-sleeved clothing stands in a low fighting stance, mouth open in a shout or battle cry. In the right hand is a long staff or spear. In the left hand is a boxy mechanical device — a gadget with buttons or a grip. Green electrical energy radiates outward from behind the figure in a burst pattern, illuminating dense foliage. The setting appears to be the exterior of the Duskmourn house, with dark vegetation and skull-like forms barely visible in the lower foreground. The overall tone is bright green against very dark surroundings.
foreground: Young fighter in green, staff in one hand, device in the other, shouting
background: Explosive burst of green electrical energy, dark foliage, dim skull shapes
emotion: defiance, fury — open-mouthed shout, combative stance, whole body leaning forward
